[7/23 Scheduled Maintenance Notice]

Sensei, there is a scheduled maintenance on 7/23 (Tue).

🗓️Maintenance Period: 7/23 (Tue) 2:00 – 9:00 AM (UTC)
➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3217&thread=2605111

※ Maintenance hours are subject to change.

[7/23 Maintenance Notice]

Sensei, the game is currently unavailable due to scheduled maintenance.

🗓️Maintenance Period: 7/23 (Tue) 2:00 – 9:00 AM (UTC).
➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3217&thread=2605111

[Extended Maintenance Notice]

7/23(Tue) Maintenance has been extended, Sensei. 
Maintenance is now due to end at 10:00 AM (UTC).  

Additional notices will be provided if there are further delays. We apologize for the inconvenience.
